meta.title: NovaMind AI — Premium AI Courses, Prompts, Skills & Digital Playbooks
meta.description: NovaMind AI delivers premium AI education, ready-to-use prompt packs, plug-and-play AI skill files and business playbooks. Learn, build and automate — from beginners to operators.
meta.og_description: Premium AI courses, prompt collections, skill files and playbooks — engineered for professionals and creators.
meta.twitter_description: Premium AI education, prompt packs and skill files for professionals and creators.

hero.lead: The AI toolkit 1,450+ professionals already use to save 12+ hours a week — premium courses, prompt libraries, plug-and-play skills and playbooks, engineered by operators who ship, not tinker.
hero.agent_text: Cold Outreach agent scheduled 14 meetings this week.

trusted.label: Trusted by professionals, founders and creators across the EU

why.heading: The unfair advantage your competitors don't have yet.
why.lead: Every resource here is built to compress months of trial-and-error into an afternoon — so you deploy AI like an operator, not a hobbyist. No CS degree, no fluff, just leverage.
why.f1_body: Field-tested playbooks — every lesson is something you can apply the same day.
why.f2_body: Plain-language descriptions, zero jargon. Advanced enough for pros, gentle enough for day one.
why.f3_body: Your purchases stay valuable — models change, playbooks improve, you get the upgrades.
why.f4_body: Every product is edited, tested and polished — no half-baked PDFs, no filler.
why.f5_body: Real humans, real answers — every message replied to personally, usually within 24 hours.
why.f6_body: Fast, encrypted payments across Europe — instant delivery to your inbox.

services.heading: Everything you need to work with AI, not around it.
services.lead: Six focused offers. One goal: turn AI into measurable results — for your business, your work, your creative practice.
services.s1_body: Digital books on AI business strategy — step-by-step, jargon-free, ready to apply. No theory-padding, just working techniques.
services.s2_body: Step-by-step video courses to master AI tools from scratch. Join the waitlist for early access and founding-member pricing.
services.s3_body: Tested prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Manus and others — copy, paste, ship. Hours of trial-and-error, avoided.
services.s4_body: Ready-made AI skills and automations you drop into your workflow. Plug-and-play — no engineer required.
services.s5_body: Presentations, offers, contracts and plans — adapted for the DACH and Bulgarian markets. Polished, ready to personalise.
services.s6_body: Private strategy sessions on AI implementation, business direction and entering the DACH market — tailored to you.

process.heading: From cart to compounding results in minutes.
process.step1_body: Browse curated packs, playbooks and skill files. Everything is scoped and priced up front.
process.step2_body: Pay in seconds via Visa or Mastercard through an encrypted EU gateway. No card details stored.
process.step3_body: Your files land in your inbox within minutes — download, install, deploy.
process.step4_body: Updates ship free for the life of the product. Your library gets better while you sleep.

benefits.heading: What you actually walk away with.
benefits.b1_body: Turn raw data into predictable, repeatable growth — decisions backed by signal, not vibes.
benefits.b2_body: Reclaim your calendar. Intelligent automations handle the repetitive so you focus on the meaningful.
benefits.b3_body: Bespoke advice from an operator who's shipped in the real world — not generic frameworks.
benefits.b4_body: If your KPIs don't improve within 90 days of implementing our playbooks, we extend the service — or refund you. You carry zero risk; we carry the outcome.

faq.heading: Answers, before you ask.
faq.lead: Quick clarity on the questions we get most — so you can decide and start with confidence.
faq.q1: What types of courses do you offer?
faq.a1: Compact, practical digital courses that teach strategy, automation and marketing fundamentals — the essentials for confident, efficient growth.
faq.q2: Can I book a one-on-one consultation?
faq.a2: Yes. A personal 1:1 session gives you tailored strategy, clear direction and immediate next steps for your goals.
faq.q3: What kind of templates do you offer?
faq.a3: Ready-to-use templates for planning, automation and marketing — designed to save time, stay organised and make every project look professional.
faq.q4: Are the courses suitable for beginners?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Every course scales — from first-time users building their initial strategy to professionals optimising established workflows.
faq.a5: Via the contact form or by email at eliza_1990@abv.bg. Every message is answered personally, usually within 24 hours.
faq.a6: Yes. If a product isn't right for you, request a refund within 14 days — no questions asked, provided the content hasn't been downloaded.

contact.heading: Talk to a human.
contact.lead: Questions about a product, a custom bundle or a private consultation? Send a note — you'll get a real reply from Eliza, usually within one business day.
